title: Oetosis obtusa
uses: Oetosis obtusa, also known as the 'Tree of Heaven,' has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its various health benefits. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to treat infections and wounds. It is also used to treat digestive issues, such as diarrhea and nausea, due to its ability to regulate the body's internal balance. Furthermore, the plant is thought to have antiviral properties, which can help to prevent the spread of certain diseases. Additionally, the extracts of Oetosis obtusa have been studied for their potential to have anti-cancer properties.
